name: Mocha Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. Add chocolate and mix until evenly distributed.
4. In another bowl, beat margarine and granulated sugar until creamy.
5. Beat in eggs one at a time, then stir in vanilla extract.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
7. Pour the batter into an ungreased 8-inch square baking dish.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving.
